Dr. Smith went to Washington, D.C. on Tuesday. He bought a 1.5 L bottle of water for $2.99! What a deal. "I can't believe it," he said. He works for NASA Inc., which is a very well-known acronym. The event was held at 5 p.m. EST. Please send an email to info@example.com for more details. Wait, is this working? Yes, it is!
